description: Use this API to modify the data of a dc bus of an existing multi-terminal dc line in the working case or to add a new dc bus to a multi-terminal dc line in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Multi-Terminal DC Transmission Line Data). The dc line must have previously been specified via the MULTI_TERM_DC_LINE_DATA API. just some stupid words to see if they show up This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, realaro = multi_term_dc_bus_data(dc, idc, intgar, realari, dcname)
python_syntax: ierr, realaro = multi_term_dc_bus_data(dc, idc, intgar, realari, dcname)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the multi-terminal dc line for which data for a dc bus is to be specified; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: idc
parameters.description: Dc bus number (must be between 1 and the number of dc buses in multi-terminal dc line dc). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: realari
parameters.description: An array of one elements specifying one element corresponding to values REALAR(1) as described above. (input).

parameters.name: dcname
parameters.description: Dc bus name. (input; blank by default).

return_values.name: realaro
return_values.description: An array of one elements specifying one element corresponding to value REALAR(2) as described above. (output).

intgar.description: IB, converter bus number or zero (0 by default).
IDC2, second dc bus number (0 by default).

realari.description: RGRND, resistance to ground (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - data for lower numbered dc bus has not yet been entered. - converter bus not found. - bus is not a converter of this multi-terminal dc line. - this dc bus is not the first dc bus of any converter. - the first dc bus of some converter is set to this dc bus. - invalid second dc bus number. - this dc bus is being connected to a converter bus. - dc bus no longer connected to some other converter. - dc bus is being specified with no converter bus. - dc bus no longer connected to converter as its first dc bus. - dc bus no longer connected to converter as its second dc bus. - bus invalid as second dc bus because it is the first dc bus of another converter. - invalid area/zone/owner number. - area table is full. - zone table is full. - owner table is full.
